services.title: Contracts
services.summary: Drafting, stress-testing, and structuring airtight commercial contracts, non-disclosure instruments, and regulatory documentation.
items: Rapid drafting of complex term sheets and venture structuring.
Crafting commercial contracts and non-disclosure instruments.
Precedent mapping and legal reasoning algorithms.
Pre-litigation risk mapping for contractual breaches.

services.title: Commercial
services.summary: Applying strict legal logic to overt commercial expansion, ensuring high-growth vectors achieve maximised revenue output without compromising statutory bounds.
items: Systemic due diligence and post-merger integration metrics.
Tax structuring & Competition Law frameworks.
Systematised commercial tier portfolios.
Automated deadline tracking and mandate management.

services.title: Civil
services.summary: Unassailable doctrinal research frameworks aimed at absolute precedent distillation to establish mathematically sound litigation forecasting.
items: High Court Writ Petitions & Appellate scaling.
Detailed research briefs mapping binding case law.
Procedural synthesis for Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) panels.
Drafting comprehensive affidavits and civil plaints.

services.title: Corporate
services.summary: Targeting the entire corporate lifecycle, addressing structural mechanics governed by the Indian Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI compliance.
items: Shareholder agreements and capital allocation frameworks.
Cross-border reverse-triangular manoeuvres.
Statutory liability indexing for corporate malfeasance.
Corporate governance audits and risk dashboards.

services.title: Criminal (Pro Bono)
services.summary: Upholding the supreme institutional duty of absolute legal capability: extending Tier-1 structural defence to society at large.
items: Public Interest Litigation research and briefing.
Safeguarding intellectual and digital identity of vital social missions.
Civil rights briefing and localised compliance guides.
Pro-bono statutory analysis for early-stage NGOs.
